n: Chapter 8: As Near As May Be

steps.t: Halbarad is at Echad Eregion. Radanir has told you of Halbarad's plan to have Fúni Gem-cutter craft an imitation ring of Barahir.
Halbarad is at Echad Eregion, waiting to speak with you. Fúni Gem-cutter has crafted imitation rings for the Grey Company, and you should speak now wi…
